---
description: Implement the approved plan in memory/tasks.md, updating memory as you go
mode: agent
---
Read `AGENTS.md`, `memory/MEMORY.md`, and the plan in `memory/tasks.md`, then follow the instructions in [harness/prompts/implement.md](../../harness/prompts/implement.md).

Make small, verified changes one step at a time, stay in scope, and keep memory updated. For non-trivial work, finish by running `/verify-change`.
